chooseRole.title: How would you like to use PreScreen AI?
chooseRole.candidateDescription: Browse job openings and participate in AI interviews
chooseRole.companyDescription: Post vacancies and screen candidates with AI

hero.title: AI That Screens Candidates While You Sleep
hero.subtitle: Let artificial intelligence conduct prescreening interviews 24/7. Our AI agent chats with every applicant, scores them on your criteria, and delivers a shortlist — so you only talk to the best.

features.title: AI-First Hiring Platform
features.subtitle: Our intelligent agents handle the entire screening pipeline — from first contact to final score.
features.aiPrescanningDesc: Every candidate is automatically screened through an AI-powered chat. No scheduling, no manual effort.
features.aiInterviewsDesc: Our AI agent conducts natural conversations via text chat or video call, available 24/7 in multiple languages.
features.twoStepDesc: Quick prescanning chat followed by an in-depth AI interview. Filter candidates efficiently.
features.analyticsDesc: Each candidate gets scored 1-10 across custom criteria with AI-generated summaries and recommendations.
features.timeDesc: Reduce screening time by 80%. Let AI handle initial interviews while you focus on top candidates.
features.smartScoringDesc: Per-criteria scoring on a 1-10 scale, overall weighted scores, and AI-generated summaries for every candidate.
features.antiCheatingDesc: Face detection, gaze tracking, and response consistency analysis powered by computer vision AI.
features.easyManagementDesc: AI automatically advances or rejects candidates based on scores. HR retains full control to override any decision.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Our AI platform handles the entire pre-screening process so your HR team can focus on finding the right people.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Create a vacancy with your requirements. AI generates screening questions automatically.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Candidates apply and go through AI prescanning chat. No scheduling needed.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Top candidates are invited to a deeper AI interview via chat or video.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Review AI scores, watch recordings, and make informed hiring decisions.

cta.title: Ready to Let AI Handle Your Screening?
cta.subtitle: Join companies that save 90% of screening time with AI-powered interviews.

footer.tagline: AI-powered candidate screening for modern hiring teams.

pipeline.title: Two-Step AI Screening Pipeline
pipeline.subtitle: Our AI handles the heavy lifting — you make the final call.
pipeline.step2Desc: Automated chat screening for initial fit
pipeline.step3Desc: Deeper evaluation via chat or video

landing.latestJobsSubtitle: Browse the latest job openings from companies using PreScreen AI
landing.noJobsYet: No job openings yet. Check back soon!
landing.noJobsCheckBack: Check back soon for new opportunities

candidate.completeProfileHint: Complete your profile to improve job matches
candidate.noRecommendationsHint: New job openings will appear here

vacancies.title: Vacancies

form.title: Title
form.visibilityPublicHint: Public vacancies appear on the job board. Private ones are link-only.
form.cvRequiredHint: Require candidates to upload a CV when applying
form.companyInfoHint: The AI interviewer will use this to introduce the company to candidates. You can fill it from a website, upload a document, or type it manually.
form.companyInfoPlaceholder: e.g. We are a leading fintech company based in Tashkent...
form.companyDescriptionHint: Edit or write the company introduction below. You can adjust any AI-generated text.
form.websiteHint: Enter your company's About page or website URL and AI will extract the info.
form.uploadHint: PDF, DOCX, or TXT (e.g. company brochure, pitch deck). Max 10MB.
form.prescanningHint: Every candidate goes through an automated AI prescanning chat after applying. The AI asks screening questions based on the vacancy details.
form.prescanningPromptHint: Guide the AI's behavior during prescanning. It already knows the vacancy details.
form.prescanningPromptPlaceholder: e.g. Focus on their experience with microservices architecture...
form.interviewHint: Enable a deeper interview for candidates who passed prescanning.
form.interviewPromptHint: Guide the interview AI. It will be tougher and more probing than prescanning.
form.interviewPromptPlaceholder: e.g. Ask deeper technical questions about system design...

vacancies.noVacanciesHint: Create your first vacancy to start receiving applications
vacancies.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this vacancy?
vacancies.keywordsHint: AI-generated search keywords for this vacancy

recommendation.weak: Weak Candidate — Not recommended to proceed

myApplication.cvBeingAnalyzed: Your CV is being analyzed. Match score will appear here soon.

postInterview.title: Interview Complete

inInterview.leaveMessage: Are you sure you want to leave? The interview will end and cannot be restarted.

integrity.noFlags: No integrity flags detected. The interview passed all checks.

flagDetails.face_not_visible: The candidate's face was not visible in the video feed.
flagDetails.multiple_faces: More than one person was detected in the video frame.
flagDetails.gaze_deviation: The candidate's gaze deviated significantly from the camera.
flagDetails.audio_anomaly: Unusual audio patterns were detected during the interview.
flagDetails.cv_inconsistency: Discrepancies were found between the candidate's CV and interview answers.
